title: Evidence Correction Manifest v1
description: Schema for evidence correction manifests that allow controlled modifications/deletions/renames of historical evidence files

correction_id.description: Unique identifier for this correction (format: YYYY-MM-DD-slug)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when correction was created

rfc_reference.description: Path to RFC or policy document that authorizes this correction

items.description: GitHub username of maintainer who approved

approved_by.description: List of maintainers who approved (minimum 2 required)

name.description: Name of risk owner who approved

risk_owner_approval.description: Risk owner approval (required for compliance exceptions)

from.description: Original evidence path (relative to repo root)

moves.description: List of evidence file movements/deletions authorized by this correction

audit_trail.description: Path to detailed audit evidence for this correction

compliance_reference.description: External compliance case number or legal reference

emergency.description: Whether this is an emergency correction (post-approval required)
